log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Satyr — Winged Striker (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Satyr — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Satyr — Winged Striker. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Satyr — Winged Striker.
→ Satyr — Winged Striker: CON save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 13 necrotic damage (half).
--- Satyr — Winged Striker --- HP: 54/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:2+9=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:11+9=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
--- Satyr — Winged Striker --- HP: 54/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Lich (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
══ ROUND 4 ══
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Satyr — Winged Striker: FAIL! 26 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 13] MAINTAINED!
→ 1/1 targets affected.

ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.

REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!

→ Satyr — Winged Striker: SUCCESS. (had advantage) 17 damage (half).
